'''lahuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallclothes|smallclothes]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallclothes|smallclothes]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lahuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læhikith|læhikith]] || [[word:læhikij|læhikij]] || [[word:læhikish|læhikish]] || [[word:læhiki|læhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lahuhukuth|lahuhukuth]] || [[word:lahuhukuj|lahuhukuj]] || [[word:lahuhukush|lahuhukush]] || [[word:lahuhuku|lahuhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lahukuth|lahukuth]] || [[word:lahukuj|lahukuj]] || [[word:lahukush|lahukush]] || [[word:lahuku|lahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lahufkuth|lahufkuth]] || [[word:lahufkuj|lahufkuj]] || [[word:lahufkush|lahufkush]] || [[word:lahufkuf|lahufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lahukuthu|lahukuthu]] || [[word:lahukuju|lahukuju]] || [[word:lahukushu|lahukushu]] || [[word:lahukuku|lahukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lahukuth|lahukuth]] || [[word:lahukuj|lahukuj]] || [[word:lahukush|lahukush]] || [[word:lahuku|lahuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lahukuthul|lahukuthul]] || [[word:lahukujul|lahukujul]] || [[word:lahukushul|lahukushul]] || [[word:lahukukul|lahukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lahukuthuthu|lahukuthuthu]] || [[word:lahukujuju|lahukujuju]] || [[word:lahukushushu|lahukushushu]] || [[word:lahukuku|lahukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lahukuthun|lahukuthun]] || [[word:lahukujun|lahukujun]] || [[word:lahukushun|lahukushun]] || [[word:lahukukun|lahukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lahukuthuoro|lahukuthuoro]] || [[word:lahukujuoro|lahukujuoro]] || [[word:lahukushuoro|lahukushuoro]] || [[word:lahukukuoro|lahukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
